task_completion.description: Log in to Moodle and navigate to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Moodle interface showing the user logged in (admin) and viewing the 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101' course page.

task_completion.description: Create a Lesson activity named 'Cell Biology Interactive Lesson' with the specified description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Course page showing the 'Cell Biology Interactive Lesson' link, or the lesson settings page showing the correct name and description ('An interactive lesson covering fundamental cell biology concepts...').

task_completion.description: Create a content page titled 'Introduction to Cells' with educational text and a continue button.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lesson editing interface showing a content page titled 'Introduction to Cells'. The content should have educational text and a button/jump configured to continue to the next page.

task_completion.description: Create a multiple-choice question page titled 'Cell Organelle Question' asking about the organelle responsible for producing energy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lesson editing interface showing a question page titled 'Cell Organelle Question' with the question text 'Which organelle is responsible for producing energy in the cell?'.

task_completion.description: Configure the correct and incorrect answers for the question page with proper grading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Question configuration or lesson edit view showing 'Mitochondria' as the correct answer (typically with a score > 0 or jump to next page) and 'Nucleus', 'Ribosome', 'Cell membrane' as incorrect answers.

task_completion.description: Create a final content page titled 'Summary and Next Steps' that ends the lesson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lesson editing interface showing a content page titled 'Summary and Next Steps' positioned at the end of the lesson sequence, with its jump configured to 'End of lesson'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Moodle web interface to create the lesson.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Moodle GUI, not terminal commands, database scripts, or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the lesson pages within the Moodle Lesson module.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Moodle lesson editing interface (e.g., 'Edit' tab showing the sequence of pages, jumps, and question types) is visible, rather than text typed into a single generic text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply display the task description to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the correct Moodle form fields (Page title, Page contents, Answer, Response, Jump, Score) rather than just pasting the prompt into a single text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The lesson must be created in the 'BIO101' course. It must be named 'Cell Biology Interactive Lesson'. The lesson structure must contain exactly 2 content pages ('Introduction to Cells' and 'Summary and Next Steps') and 1 multiple-choice question page ('Cell Organelle Question'). The question must have at least 3 (specifically 4) answer choices: Mitochondria (Correct), Nucleus, Ribosome, and Cell membrane (Incorrect).
